items.claim: Bogdan Guskov stepped up on short notice and got his training camp cut a week short.
items.quote: Gushkov just got cut a week short. Still had a lot of time to train.

items.claim: Nurullo Aliev is an undefeated fighter and mostly a wrestler.
items.quote: Undefeated fighter, very good. He struck a lot more in his last fight, but mostly a wrestler.

items.claim: Brent Primus is on a three-loss streak.
items.quote: He's on a three loss streak, really isn't that good.

items.claim: Wellington Turman is coming off three losses in a row and has not won a fight since 2022.
items.quote: Wellington Turman, who's also coming off three losses in a row, has not won a fight since 2022.

items.claim: Wellington Turman hasn't fought in two and a half years, with his last fight in December of 2023.
items.quote: He hasn't fought in two and a half years. December of 2023 was his last fight.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is coming off a two-loss streak with both defeats by finish.
items.quote: Gibson coming off a two loss streak, both finishes.

items.claim: Cody Gibson leaves himself open with his hands down and chin in the air when throwing combos.
items.quote: Very aggressive fighter. Tries to overwhelm you with combos but he just leaves himself open a lot. Hands are down, chin in the air.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has very good head movement, ducking under punches and landing right hands.
items.quote: Showed very good head movement, ducking under the punches and then landing a right hand

items.claim: Nurullo Aliev is a control wrestler who doesn't land a lot of damage on the ground or go for many submissions.
items.quote: He doesn't have that ground and pound or the submissions. He's a control wrestler. Doesn't land a lot of damage on the ground. Doesn't go for submissions that much.
